description.en: This class can be used to create an HTML table (or a complete HTML file containing the table) showing a side by side, line by line comparison of text with inter-line and intra-line change highlights. The table can be generated in either full or contextual difference mode. The constructor for this class is: __init__(tabsize=8, wrapcolumn=None, linejunk=None, charjunk=IS_CHARACTER_JUNK)¶ Initializes instance of HtmlDiff. tabsize is an optional keyword argument to specify tab stop spacing and de...
